differential_diagnoses: Severe community-acquired pneumonia (e.g., atypical or viral)
Dengue hemorrhagic fever with pulmonary involvement
next_steps: Contact local public health authorities for Hantavirus serology (IgM/IgG) and PCR testing
Perform bronchoalveolar lavage for cytology, microbiology, and fungal stains/culture
Initiate broad-spectrum antibiotics (continue current regimen with emphasis on coverage for atypical pathogens)
Strict fluid management monitoring (aiming for neutral or negative fluid balance)
Obtain specialized diagnostic workup for Hantavirus (Andes virus specifically)
